title: The Fugitive Economic Offenders Act, 2018
full_text: The Fugitive Economic Offenders Act, 2018 भगोड़ा आर्थिक अपराधी अधिनियम, 2018 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: A2018-17 Act Number: 17 Enactment Date: 2018-07-31 Act Year: 2018 Short Title: The Fugitive Economic Offenders Act, 2018 Hindi Title: भगोड़ा आर्थिक अपराधी अधिनियम, 2018 Long Title: An Act to provide for measures to deter fugitive economic offenders from evading the process of law in India by staying outside the jurisdiction of Indian courts, to preserve the sanctity of the rule of law in India and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 21-04-2018 Last Updated: 15-11-2018 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Fugitive Economic Offenders Act, 2018 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II DECLARATION OF FUGITIVE ECONOMIC OFFENDERS AND CONFISCATION OF PROPERTY CHAPTER III MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Application of Act. Section 4. Application for declaration of fugitive economic offender and procedure therefor. Section 5. Attachment of property. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Powers of Director and other officers. Section 7. Power of survey. Section 8. Search and seizure. Section 9. Search of persons. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Notice. Section 11. Procedure for hearing application. Section 12. Declaration of fugitive economic offender. Section 13. Supplementary application. Section 14. Power to disallow civil claims. Section 15. Management of properties confiscated under this Act. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Rules of evidence. Section 17. Appeal. Section 18. Bar of jurisdiction. Section 19. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 20. Power of Central Government to amend Schedule. Section 21. Overriding effect. Section 22. Application of other laws not barred. Section 23. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Laying of rules before Parliament. Section 25. Power to remove difficulties. Section 26. Repeal and saving. Schedule 1.
